name: smartherbo
description: Revolutionize livestock management with Smart Herbo, the premier mobile biometric engine for precision cattle analytics. Leveraging a localized neural core and hardware-accelerated TensorFlow.js inference, Smart Herbo delivers high-accuracy weight predictions and metabolic nutritional guidance directly on your device without cloud requirements. Experience a futuristic, cyberpunk-grade interface optimized with AR-driven spatial measurements and haptic feedback, designed for mission-critical offline performance in the field. From automated morphology verification to professional-grade reporting, Smart Herbo integrates elite AI computer vision with industrial farm workflows to ensure your data remains private, secure, and instantaneous.
author: Ashif Ahmed Shuvo
